ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 503, THE PETITION OF KEVIN TAGLIERI TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF VINCENT TAGLIERI BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION. MR. CHEW CONFIRMS PLAINTIFF HAS NOT BEEN ABLE TO FIND AN AGENT FOR SERVICE AS TO MIKE SILVER & SONS. THE COURT'S ORDER WILL NOT APPLY TO MIKE SILVER & SONS. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Kevin Taglieri To Perpetuate Testimony Of Vincent Taglieri By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: THE PETITION OF KEVIN TAGLIERI TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF VINCENT TAGLIERI BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION.

Appearances via Court Call: Andrew Chew of Brayton Purcell LLP (415.898.1555) for petitioner and moving party; Yen-Yu Liu of Berkes Crane Robinson & Seal LLP (213.955.1150) for CalPortland Company; David M. Glaspy of the Law Offices of Glaspy & Glaspy, Inc. (408.279.8844) for KB Home; Kristi L. Young of Manning Gross & Massenburg LLP (415.512.4381) for Hajoca Corporation; Solomon Pantuch of Hawkins Parnell & Young (415.766.3200) for Marconi Plastering Company.

Mr. Chew confirms plaintiff has not been able to find an agent for service as to Mike Silver & Sons. The Court's order will not apply to Mike Silver & Sons. Plaintiff is to submit a proposed form of order with this modification. Judge: Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Jennifer Roux, CSR 11033 (Tel: 877-451-1580, Email: jenrouxcsr@gmail.com, proceedings reported via Court Call) (503/CML)
